message:
chore(gitignore): add build artifact and profiling data patterns

Add patterns to ignore ephemeral files:
- a.out - default compiled binary output from gcc/clang
- *.profraw - LLVM profiling raw data files generated during
  instrumented builds (cargo-llvm-cov, etc.)

These are build-time artifacts that should not be tracked.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -13,3 +13,9 @@ fuzz/artifacts/
 # Proptest regression files (generated)
 **/proptest-regressions/
 fuzz/corpus/
+
+# Build artifacts
+a.out
+
+# Profiling data (llvm-profdata)
+*.profraw
